name: Hybrid Sports Smartwatch
full_description: The perfect balance of style and substance. Features mechanical physical watch hands over a hidden digital crisp smart info screen.

name: Next-Gen Gaming Console
full_description: Experience lightning-fast loading speeds, ultra-high-definition 4K graphics at up to 120 FPS, and a deeply immersive gaming eco-system.

name: Apple Watch Series 9
full_description: The ultimate device for a healthy life is now even more powerful. Features the S9 SiP chip, a brighter display, and a magic new way to use your watch without touching the screen.

name: Apex NeoPods True Wireless Earbuds
full_description: True wireless earbuds featuring premium sound engineering, touch controls, and a compact charging case built for everyday commuters.
